sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 58

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 58:1
items.html: (to the question) For the root of ZA [Zeir Anpin] is drawn from the Reshimot [records] of the NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod] of AK [Adam Kadmon], from the secret of the Vav and the Nekuda [point] that the Yesod of AK imparted to the Yesodot of AVI [Aba ve Ima]. Now, all that Light of the NHY of AK is drawn after the NHY of AK rose as MAN [Mayin Nukvin] to AB-SAG of AK and received from them the new Light that split the Parsa; and from there they descended below the Tabur [navel] and illuminated the Vav and the Nekuda to AVI. Thus even the Katnut of ZA begins only after the lowering of the Hey Tachtona [lower Hey] from the Eynaim [eyes], by the illumination of the Zivug [coupling] of AB-SAG. Therefore a Zivug of kisses [Neshikin] is needed, for the lowering of the Hey Tachtona from the Eynaim, even for the discernment of the Ibur [conception] of ZA. (p. 756, beginning "And the matter")
